keyFindings: Q-P0 remains provisionally converged on a command-owned Copilot target-authority preamble/helper shared by deep-research and deep-review.
Q-P1 remains provisionally converged on an isolated SPEC_KIT_DB_DIR degraded graph sweep plus existing mocked fallbackDecision unit coverage.

Q-P2 should not lower DEFAULT_DEBOUNCE_MS first; code_graph_status already re-probes freshness but needs a non-mutating readiness snapshot exposing action/reason without using ensureCodeGraphReady's debounce or cleanup side effects.

Q-OPP should preserve CocoIndex rawScore/pathClass/rankingSignals/sourceRealpath through code_graph_context anchors as provenance; no evidence supports adding a second path-class rerank in mcp_server/lib/search.
Q-ARCH seam refined to authority-vs-recovered-context and readiness-signal-vs-remediation-action.
